note: As-is baseline of the render path Slice B changes. Today badge()/renderCard check WaitingForUser() and AwaitingUAT() separately; awaiting-plan-acceptance gets no distinct cue; there is no WaitingForInput() union; columns join edge-to-edge with no borders; gogo status has no waiting column. Slice A (skill-bash) is textual with no structural before diagram.

diagrams.title: Before: two separate status checks, no waiting-for-input union, no column borders
